title: Add --dns=none
body:
Fix for #2744 

This adds support for --dns=none, which specifies that we should not bind-mount in `/etc/resolv.conf`.

Still to be added: similar flag for disabling addition of `/etc/hosts` (can't reuse the existing flag). Also needs tests.

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@rhatdan @baude Thoughts on naming for a new flag to disable creation of `/etc/hosts`?
could `--dns=none` work for both `/etc/resolv.conf` and `/etc/hosts` or are there cases where we would like one of them but not the other?

I am fine with the option name.
Needs update for man pages.
Added a new flag `--no-hosts` to disable creation of `/etc/hosts`. Added manpages and bash completions. Removing WIP. Working on tests now.

Testing this is proving to be a pain, because I don't want to tie us to the contents of any specific image's `/etc/hosts` and `/etc/resolv.conf` (we can't manually add them with buildah because they're being mounted over, and Docker and Podman both previously overwrote them unconditionally so nobody really cared what was in them)
